title: Fix curve geometry + track closure
description: CircularArc.point() formula is wrong (SW instead of NE for CCW from east). ClothoidCurve.point() ignores theta0 and k<0. Fix both, then add constraint-based track closure in compose_full. Redesign DemoTrack as proper closed circuit.

title: Stage 5 T11: pyproject deps + CLI entry
description: Add streamlit>=1.31 to dependencies. Replace broken f1track entry with f1track-app -> f1_track.viz.app:run. See plan Task 11.
close_reason: T11 done: deps updated, f1track-app CLI registered

title: Stage 5 T12: Verification + smoke test
description: Full pytest run, import smoke test, end-to-end DEMO run, manual Streamlit walk-through (DEMO/AUTO/MANUAL), update CLAUDE.md, push. See plan Task 12. Use Opus.
close_reason: T12 done: 77/77 tests, imports OK, E2E smoke passes

title: Stage 5 T10: Streamlit app
description: viz/app.py: sidebar form (DEMO/AUTO/MANUAL) + tabs (Map/3D/Analysis) + stats bar with FIA badge. Cached compose_full. Manual smoke test. See plan Task 10.
close_reason: T10 done: Streamlit app created, syntax OK

title: Stage 5 T8: TrackComposer.compose_full
description: New method returning TrackSession with full geometry, elevation, and speed profile. Seeded for reproducibility. See plan Task 8.
close_reason: T8 done: compose_full returns TrackSession, all tests pass

title: Stage 5 T9: Plotly figure builders
description: viz/plots.py: 6 pure functions for 2D map (color=speed), 3D scatter, speed/curvature/elevation profiles, segment breakdown pie. Streamlit-independent. See plan Task 9.
close_reason: T9 done: 6 Plotly builders, all tests pass

title: Stage 5 T7: Refactor TrackComposer expose segments
description: Extract _build_segments() and _track_from_segments() from compose_auto/manual. Eliminate aggregate-calc duplication (Stage 4 review). create_demo_segments() returns segment list separately. compose() public behavior unchanged. See plan Task 7.

title: Stage 5 T5: generate_elevation deterministic
description: viz/elevation.py: cubic spline through segment-boundary control points biased by segment type (BlindCrest peak, OffCamber/Hairpin valley). Seeded RNG, normalized to [0, max_change]. See plan Task 5.
close_reason: T5 done: generate_elevation with cubic spline + bias, all tests pass

title: Stage 5 T2: Refactor end_point into Segment base
description: Move end_point implementation into base class via _build_curves chaining. Remove all 10 subclass overrides. See plan Task 2.
close_reason: T2 done: end_point consolidated into base class, all tests pass

title: Stage 5 T3: Segment.sample() with adaptive ds
description: Base-class sample(initial_heading, ds_default) returning dense local-frame arrays {x,y,heading,curvature,s_local}. Adaptive ds: 10m on Line, 1m on CircularArc, 2m on ClothoidCurve. No duplicate points at sub-curve boundaries. See plan Task 3.
close_reason: T3 done: Segment.sample() implemented, all 47 tests pass

title: Stage 5 T6: TrackSession dataclass
description: viz/session.py: container with track, segments, geometry, speed_profile, seed, params. See plan Task 6.

title: Stage 5 T4: TrackGeometry + build_centerline
description: viz/geometry.py: TrackGeometry dataclass + build_centerline() that walks segments, chains samples into global XY frame. See plan Task 4.
close_reason: T4 done: TrackGeometry + build_centerline, all tests pass

title: Stage 5 T1: Segment._build_curves
description: Add abstract _build_curves to Segment base + concrete impls in all 10 subclasses (Straight, CircularTurn, Hairpin, Chicane, Esses, HighSpeedTurn, Parabolica, TighteningRadius, OffCamber, BlindCrest). Each subclass returns ordered list of sub-curves whose chained traversal equals end_point(). See plan Task 1.
close_reason: T1 done: _build_curves implemented for all 10 segment types, all tests pass

title: Stage 5: Visualization
description: 2D/3D track visualization, speed profile, CLI report. Components: plot2d.py (matplotlib), plot3d.py (Plotly), speed_profile.py, report.py

title: Stage 4: Параметрический генератор трасс
description: Реализовать систему параметризации для процедурного создания F1-трасс. GenParams модель с параметрами трассы, Composer для сборки трассы из сегментов в соответствии с параметрами. Интеграция с RuleSet и Validator для гарантии соответствия ограничениям FIA.

title: Stage 3: QSS симулятор круга
description: sim/car.py: F1 пресет (798kg, 770kW, downforce). sim/qss.py: quasi-steady-state цикл -> v(s), ax(s), ay(s), throttle, brake, gear. sim/raceline.py: минимально-кривизновая оптимизация. test_sim.py: Monza ~1:21.
close_reason: All 7 tests passing: F1Car model, MinimumCurvatureRaceline, QSS simulator with grip/power limits

title: Stage 2: FIA валидация (Appendix O)
description: geometry/validate.py: длина 3.5-7км, ширина >=12м, R первого <300м, мин радиусы, перепады, банкинг. test_validate: реальные трассы (Monza, Silverstone упрощённые) проходят, плохие — нет.
close_reason: FIA Appendix O validation complete. 8/8 tests passing. Ready for Stage 3 (QSS simulator).

title: Stage 1: Скелет и геометрия (curve/segment/track)
description: curve.py (clothoid+arc+line, G2), segment.py (9 типов), track.py (Track = Segment[]), schema.py (Pydantic), tests/test_geometry.py (длина, замкнутость, производные).
close_reason: Geometry primitives (curves + segment palette) complete. 9/9 tests passing. Ready for Stage 2 (FIA validation).

title: Stage 0.5: RuleSet/Standard абстракция
description: ✓ DONE: F1 Grade 1 + CIK-FIA Karting. RuleSet Pydantic-модель, 5 tests passing.
close_reason: RuleSet abstraction complete with 5 passing tests

title: [epic] f1_track — параметрический проектировщик F1-трасс
description: MVP: параметры → геометрия → симуляция → отчёт. Этапы 1-5 = MVP, 6-7 = post-MVP.

title: [epic] f1_track — параметрический проектировщик F1-трасс
description: MVP: дизайн-симулятор без AC-экспорта. Параметры -> геометрия -> симуляция -> отчёт.
